Hey there! This website is still in progress - sorry for any bugs or broken links!

About Me

I am currently a graduate student at UC Berkeley. Before this I was at MIT.

I am interested in human-centered design, including the design process and ethics in design, as well as utilizing computation to augment engineering design.

Inspired by the large amounts of technology blogs I read throughout my undergrad and going into grad school, I decided to use Jekyll to document my work here! This page was customized from the poole Hyde theme using Jekyll.
